profile.name: Davi
profile.role_in_household: Primary client; self-employed and typically leads on investments and retirement planning, especially with retirement close.
profile.financial_literacy_level: Moderate-to-high: follows balances and key dates, asks tax-aware questions, and wants clear assumptions before agreeing.
profile.risk_attitude_behavioral: Moderate in behavior: comfortable with diversified risk, but becomes more downside-focused as timelines shorten; prefers stress tests and guardrails.
profile.communication_style: Direct and detail-oriented; will quote exact figures when he has them, correct small inaccuracies, and ask pointed follow-ups. Minimal hedging, occasional “let me be precise.”
emotional_tendencies: calms down with checklists and next steps
profile.decision_making_style: Option-comparison driven: wants 2–3 clear paths, picks one, then prefers consistency; seeks spouse buy-in but often frames the choices.
profile.trust_level_toward_advisor: Cautiously open: trust builds with accuracy, transparency, and a repeatable planning process.
hidden_concerns: fear of outliving savings or needing to support unexpected costs

profile.name: Linda
profile.role_in_household: Spouse/partner; employed and focused on affordability, monthly cash flow, and keeping plans simple and understandable.
profile.financial_literacy_level: Moderate: understands budgeting and retirement accounts broadly, prefers plain-English summaries; occasionally mixes terms (gross vs. net, premium vs. benefit) and asks clarifying questions.
profile.risk_attitude_behavioral: Moderate-to-slightly conservative: prefers steady, low-maintenance approaches; skeptical of strategies that feel complex or hard to explain.
profile.communication_style: Warm and collaborative; speaks in round numbers (“around,” “roughly”), uses hedging (“I think,” “if I’m remembering right”), and checks how choices affect monthly spending.
emotional_tendencies: stress when discussions get overly technical
confidence rises when she understands the rationale
profile.decision_making_style: Consensus-driven: wants to talk through tradeoffs together; may defer on investment mechanics but holds firm on lifestyle and clarity.
profile.trust_level_toward_advisor: Neutral-to-positive: engages when the advisor is clear and inclusive; withdraws if she feels talked over.
hidden_concerns: maintaining lifestyle and flexibility later in retirement
